name: @hd-agent-skills/andrej-karpathy-skills
description: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes, packaged as a Claude Code plugin. Derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

scripts.postinstall:
node -e "console.log('
[andrej-karpathy-skills] Installed. Register with Claude Code:
  /plugin marketplace add ' + require('path').resolve(__dirname) + '
  /plugin install andrej-karpathy-skills
')"
